edge_case_info.name: OCR Edge Case and Stress Test Dataset
edge_case_info.description: Challenging scenarios for OCR robustness testing

edge_cases.description: Poor OCR quality with character recognition errors
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should handle OCR errors gracefully and attempt reconstruction

edge_cases.description: Date that could be DD/MM or MM/DD
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should use regional preference to resolve ambiguity
Should detect invalid checksum and flag appropriately

edge_cases.description: Mixed languages that could confuse classification
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should handle mixed language contexts correctly

edge_cases.description: Many similar dates that could cause confusion
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should prioritize consumer-facing dates over internal dates

edge_cases.description: Extremely verbose label with lots of text
text_blocks: Premium Artisanal Organic Free-Range Grass-Fed Sustainably Sourced Lactose-Free Vitamin D Enriched Whole Milk
This product is made from the finest milk sourced from happy cows that graze on organic pastures in the beautiful countryside of Northern France
Ingredients: Organic milk, Vitamin D3, Natural flavoring, Organic vanilla extract, Filtered water, Sea salt from Guérande
Allergen Information: Contains milk. May contain traces of nuts, soy, and gluten due to shared processing facilities
Storage Instructions: Keep refrigerated at 2-4°C. Do not freeze. Shake well before use. Once opened, consume within 5 days
Nutritional Information per 100ml: Energy 65kcal, Protein 3.2g, Carbohydrates 4.8g, Fat 3.6g, Calcium 120mg
Producer: Ferme Bio du Soleil, 12345 Normandie, France
Distributor: Premium Dairy Co., London, UK
Customer Service: Call 0800-123-456 for any questions
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should extract key information despite noise

edge_cases.description: Text with special characters and symbols
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should handle special characters without errors

edge_cases.description: Large batch of text blocks for performance testing
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should maintain performance with large input

stress_test_scenarios.name: Concurrent Processing
stress_test_scenarios.description: Test concurrent processing of multiple images

stress_test_scenarios.name: Memory Leak Detection
stress_test_scenarios.description: Test for memory leaks over extended processing

stress_test_scenarios.name: Error Recovery
stress_test_scenarios.description: Test system recovery from various error conditions
